name: Crumb Cake/Jackie
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow cake mix with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to the package directions.
2. Pour the batter into a 9x13-inch pan and bake for 30 minutes.
3. Remove the cake from the oven.
4. In a bowl, mix together flour, sugar, softened butter, cinnamon, chocolate chips, and chopped nuts until the mixture is fairly smooth.
5. Spread the mixture evenly over the top of the cake.
6. Return the cake to the oven and bake for the remaining time specified in the package directions.
7. Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
